name: Lian Beng Group Ltd
summary: Lian Beng Group Ltd, an investment holding company, engages in the construction business in Singapore and Australia. It operates in four segments: Construction, Dormitory, Investment Holding, and Property Development. The Construction segment constructs residential, institutional, industrial, and commercial properties; and undertakes civil engineering projects in private and public sectors. This segment also sells construction materials, such as concrete and asphalt; provides engineering services; and leases construction machinery. The Dormitory segment is involved in the rental of dormitory units; and provision of dormitory services. The Investment Holding segment holds investments in quoted and unquoted securities and properties. The Property Development segment develops and sells residential, commercial, and industrial properties, as well as offers property management services. The company also provides engineering, automation, and technical services, as well as management and management consulting services; undertakes general building construction, civil engineering, and electrical works; manufactures and supplies concrete; and sells, rents, and maintains construction machinery and equipment. In addition, it is involved in shipping operations, including chartering of ships; trading steel products; and the provision of training for construction workers. Lian Beng Group Ltd was founded in 1973 and is based in Singapore.
